Created: YYYY-MM-DD

# YYYY-MM-DD Weekday

## Today's Most Important Thing
Write the one most important thing for today. It should be actionable and possible to move forward today.

## Tasks
Write today's task list. The first task should align with today's most important thing.

## Notes
Record important progress, ideas, or events from the day.

## Evening Review
Write what went well, what could be improved, and the one thing you most want to move forward tomorrow.

## Tomorrow's Plan
Write 1-3 important items to carry into tomorrow's daily note.
